---
title: "<i> Church Quarterly Review, The</i>"
---

## <i> Church Quarterly Review, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This ran 1875-1968.  It was edited from its foundation until his death  by the Rev. A. R. Ashwell (1824–1879).  CMY contributed a review of Edith Jacob’s ‘Thoughts on Invalid Life’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
